extension.workbenchStudio.enabled.descri: Whether to enable the Workbench Studio patcher.
extension.workbenchStudio.backgrounds.ed: Place the image above or below the code.
Each style of editor section image.
Seconds of interval for carousel, default `0` to disabled.
extension.workbenchStudio.backgrounds.fu: Opacity of the images, alias to [opacity](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/CSS/opacity). `0.1 ~ 0.3` recommended.
Seconds of interval for carousel, default `0` to disabled.
extension.workbenchStudio.typography.exp: Font overrides for sidebar tree views (explorer, source control, search results, extensions, debug). Changes require Apply-and-Reload.
CSS `font-family` value, e.g. `"JetBrains Mono", monospace`. Empty to use the default.
Font size in pixels. `0` to use the default.
CSS `font-weight` value. Empty to use the default.
Freeform CSS passthrough — any property/value pairs (e.g. `letter-spacing`, `line-height`, `color`). Applied after the typed fields, so duplicate keys here override.
extension.workbenchStudio.urlProtocol.er: The image url must use https or file protocol.
